reviews.review_description:
I saw the existing 1/5 star rating and honestly didn't expect much, but I wanted to give it a fair chance and see for myself. Unfortunately, I was wrong to hope. The terrible reviews are 100% accurate.

This is pure false advertising. The store page screenshots are a complete and total lie.

On the Quest 3, this game is an ugly, blurry, pixelated mess. The actual resolution is shockingly low, making it look nothing like the crisp images they used to sell it. It's technically unacceptable.
